school.description: ZPHS Anandhapuram was honoured as the Best Government School in Vizianagaram District for academic excellence, infrastructure, and student welfare.
Achieved 100% pass percentage in SSC Board Examinations for the third consecutive year.
Recognized for maintaining an eco-friendly campus with extensive plantation and zero plastic usage.
